mapper.select: SELECT ja.*, u.full_name as publisher_name, j.name as journal_name FROM journal_announcement ja LEFT JOIN user u ON ja.publisher_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN journal j ON ja.related_journal_id = j.id WHERE ja.is_top = 1 AND ja.publish_status = 'Published' AND (ja.effective_date IS NULL OR ja.effective_date <= CURDATE()) AND (ja.expire_date IS NULL OR ja.expire_date >= CURDATE()) ORDER BY ja.priority DESC, ja.publish_date DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT ja.*, u.full_name as publisher_name, j.name as journal_name FROM journal_announcement ja LEFT JOIN user u ON ja.publisher_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN journal j ON ja.related_journal_id = j.id WHERE ja.id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN publish_status = 'Published' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as published, SUM(CASE WHEN publish_status = 'Draft' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as draft, SUM(CASE WHEN publish_status = 'Scheduled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as scheduled, SUM(CASE WHEN is_top = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as topCount, SUM(CASE WHEN (effective_date IS NULL OR effective_date <= CURDATE()) AND (expire_date IS NULL OR expire_date >= CURDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as activeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN announcement_type = 'JOURNAL_INFO' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as journalInfoCount, SUM(CASE WHEN announcement_type = 'IMPACT_FACTOR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as impactFactorCount, SUM(CASE WHEN announcement_type = 'POLICY_GUIDE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as policyGuideCount, SUM(CASE WHEN announcement_type = 'IMPORTANT_NOTICE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as importantNoticeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN announcement_type = 'OTHER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as otherCount FROM journal_announcement
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM journal_announcement WHERE publish_status = 'Published' AND (effective_date IS NULL OR effective_date <= CURDATE()) AND (expire_date IS NULL OR expire_date >= CURDATE())
SELECT announcement_type as type, COUNT(*) as count FROM journal_announcement WHERE publish_status = 'Published' GROUP BY announcement_type
SELECT announcement_type as type, COUNT(*) as count FROM journal_announcement WHERE publish_status = 'Published' GROUP BY announcement_type
